Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 149 

NO_PSTV_TEST_SW 

LABEL: No Positive Test Switch 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates that a positive test result is not included in the patient’s medical records. 

SHORT NAME: NO_PSTV_TEST_SW 

LONG NAME: NO_PSTV_TEST_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH (derived) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2021. 

This field is derived when the condition code (CLM RLT
